To pair a new Tessera thermostat with the mobile app, first install the app
from the App Store or Google Play and create an account. Power the
thermostat by mounting it on the wall plate. Open the app, tap Add Device,
and follow the on-screen prompts to scan the QR code on the back of the unit.
Pairing uses Bluetooth Low Energy and typically completes in under a minute.
After pairing, the app will prompt you to connect the thermostat to your
home Wi-Fi network.
